name: coalmine
description: CoalMine — a quality meta-skills suite for coding agents (canary-in-the-coal-mine early warning).

plugins.name: coalmine
plugins.description: 9 quality-canary skills: rotcanary (code-health), gold-standard (world-class completeness), source-grounding (anti-hallucination), supply-chain-audit (deps/build/artifact), resilience-audit (failure-mode FMEA), telemetry-canary (observability), testability-canary (decoupling/DI), scale-canary (perf scaling), drift-canary (contract/schema drift). rotcanary adds cross-platform auto-cadence hooks. Served conformed from the committed plugin/ dist (built by scripts/build-plugin.mjs).
